name: Radicchio & Greens with Hot Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear the lettuce and arugula into bite-sized pieces.
2. Tear the radicchio into slightly larger pieces.
3. Heat the olive oil, balsamic vinegar, and minced shallot in a saucepan over low heat until warm.
4. Pour the hot dressing over the greens and toss gently to combine.
